# Healthy Homemade Habits

> A real-food resource run by Hana & Timm, a Midwest husband-and-wife team who cut Ultra Processed Foods in 2020 using the 80/20 eating method.

## About

Healthy Homemade Habits helps everyday people identify and reduce Ultra Processed Foods (UPFs) in their diet without giving up the foods they love. The site is built around the 80/20 principle: eat wholesome, nutrient-rich food 80% of the time, and enjoy your favorite indulgences 20% of the time — no guilt, no deprivation.

Founded by Hana and Timm, the site combines free educational content with practical paid PDF guides for people who want to eat real food but don't know where to start. They also post weekly videos on YouTube covering grocery shopping, real-food swaps, and 80/20 meal planning.

## Core Topics

- **Ultra Processed Foods (UPFs)**: what they are, why they're designed to be addictive, how to identify UPF ingredients on any product label
- **The 80/20 eating method**: a flexible, non-restrictive way to eat mostly real food while still enjoying favorites — sustainable for life
- **Ingredient label reading**: how to decode any nutrition label quickly, what red-flag additives to watch for, and how to do a 5-second product evaluation at the store
- **Grocery shopping habits**: planning meals, writing effective grocery lists, navigating store layout, resisting retail psychology traps, and staying on budget
- **Real food swaps**: affordable, practical substitutions for the most common UPFs in an everyday kitchen

## Offerings

### Free: The 5-Second Shopper
- **URL**: https://www.healthyhomemadehabits.com/free-guide
- **Format**: PDF delivered by email
- **Price**: Free
- **What's inside**: A quick-reference list of 125+ Ultra Processed Food ingredients organized alphabetically and color-coded by severity (fine in moderation / limit / avoid entirely). Includes a simple 5-second formula for evaluating whether a packaged product is worth buying. Also covers tried-and-true tips for navigating the grocery store.

### $17: Eat Real, Live Better
- **URL**: https://www.healthyhomemadehabits.com/eat-real-guide
- **Format**: Instant PDF download
- **Price**: $17 one-time
- **What's inside**: A 6-section guide covering label reading in plain English, the UPF red-flag ingredient list, aisle-by-aisle grocery navigation, real food swaps for common UPFs, the science behind why UPFs hook you, and the 80/20 mindset for sustainable healthy eating.

### $47: The Perfect Grocery List
- **URL**: https://www.healthyhomemadehabits.com/grocery-guide
- **Format**: Instant PDF download
- **Price**: $47 one-time
- **What's inside**: A 5-chapter comprehensive grocery shopping system. Covers crafting a personal 80/20 diet plan, understanding retail psychology to avoid UPF traps, implementing the list system at a real grocery store, creating a weekly meal plan, and finding healthy recipes. Includes 4 blank grocery list templates, 4 blank weekly menus, a done-for-you first grocery list, UPF quick-reference cards, 14 favorite recipes, and a list of recommended kitchen staples.

### YouTube Channel
- **URL**: https://www.youtube.com/@healthyhomemadehabits
- **Format**: Free weekly videos
- **Topics**: Efficient grocery shopping, 80/20 lifestyle, real-food swaps for common UPFs, grocery hauls, meal planning

## Who This Is For

- People who want to eat healthier but find restrictive diets unsustainable
- Anyone confused by ingredient labels or overwhelmed by "health food" marketing
- People who want to reduce Ultra Processed Foods without giving up everything they enjoy
- Anyone who dreads grocery shopping and wants a simpler, more intentional system
- Families of any size looking for practical real-food habits

## Contact

- **Email**: hello@healthyhomemadehabits.com
- **YouTube**: https://www.youtube.com/@healthyhomemadehabits
